sourceTitle: Notification to Students on the Use of AI Tools in Classes (ver 1.0)
evidenceSnippetOriginal: The University of Tokyo does not enforce a blanket prohibition on the use of generative AI tools. Instead, we are actively exploring their potential and plan to provide practical guidance for their use.
rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
